title: 48-Month Extension / SEH
desc: You are approaching 48 months of benefits and need an extension to graduate.

fields.name: monthsUsed
fields.label: Months of Entitlement Used So Far

fields.name: hasSeh
fields.label: Has the VRC declared you have a Serious Employment Handicap (SEH)?

fields.name: extensionReason
fields.label: Reason extension is needed to complete plan
fields.placeholder: e.g. Double major required to secure suitable entry-level placement

errors: Asserting that the 48-month limit is a hard statutory cap that can never be extended.
Claiming VREO signature is always required when extension concurrence was legally delegated under the 2024 final rule.

evidenceChecklist.text: Initial evaluation document finding a Serious Employment Handicap (SEH)
Copy of signed IWRP or course rehabilitation plan
Transcripts showing outstanding credits to complete approved goal
Labor market listings showing target goal is the only suitable placement

bestNextActionRules.criteria: 48-month cap reached with active SEH finding
bestNextActionRules.action: Request program extension citing Serious Employment Handicap under 38 U.S.C. § 3105(c).

reviewLaneQuestions.question: Has the VA officially documented that you have a Serious Employment Handicap?
Have you used 48 months or more of VA education benefits?
